name: Albrecht Elementary School
description: Albrecht Elementary School is a place to play pickleball in Brodhead, WI. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Brodhead Middle School
description: Brodhead Middle School is a place to play pickleball in Brodhead, WI. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Green County Family YMCA
description: Green County Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Monroe, WI. There are 7 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.
fees: Members only — $14 day pass to the YMCA or free to YMCA members

name: North East Park
description: North East Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Monroe, WI. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.
open_play_schedule: Open to the public. There is a pickleball club run through the Monroe Parks Department $35 Spring into summer and Fall into winter that reserves courts and provides equipment M / W / F 8a - 11a and M / W 6p - 9p.

name: Parkside Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at Parkside Elementary School in Monroe, WI! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Twining Park
description: Come play pickleball at Twining Park in Monroe, WI! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
